series_metadata.series_description: To provide a uniform method of documenting non-traffic misdemeanor and minor misdemeanor arrests. (HP-7M)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: WHITE - Original - Filed with the Court. BLUE- Duplicate copy to the Defendant. BUFF - Triplicate copy retained for five (5) years plus current, then destroyed. ; Electronic: Store in OTIS for five years plus current, then deleted., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
